results.title: Unabyss for Claude — AI Assistants — Visalytica
results.content:
Unabyss for Claude is a groundbreaking tool designed to enhance the capabilities of AI language models by offering shared memory across multiple applications and LLMs. It allows Claude to access and recall context from various sources like email, Google Drive, GitHub, Notion, and meeting recordings, creating a unified memory that improves AI interactions and productivity. Unlike traditional integrations that require manual wiring of each app, Unabyss automates the process, ensuring Claude stays updated with all relevant information in real-time. This results in more accurate, context-aware responses that truly understand your business and personal workflows. Perfect for teams and individuals seeking seamless AI collaboration, Unabyss makes AI smarter, more private, and portable by [...] Visalytica

# Unabyss

## Shared memory across all apps and LLMs. In Claude.

Visit website

Unabyss image number 01

Unabyss image number 11

Unabyss image number 21

Claude doesn’t know what happens in GPT.   
  
And neither fully understands who you are or what your company does.   
  
Now it can.   
Claude can access memories from your other AI agents and everyday apps: email, Drive, GitHub, Notion, meeting recorders, and 20+ more. It also saves new memories, so GPT stays in sync with the exact same context.   
  
Memory built this way is more precise and accurate than connecting tools directly to Claude via MCP.   
  
Finally, a real memory that follows you. Private. Portable.

# Unabyss

## Shared memory across all apps and LLMs in Claude

Unabyss Unabyss Unabyss Unabyss Unabyss

Claude doesn’t know what happens in GPT and doesn’t fully understand who you are or what your company does. With Unabyss, Claude can access memories from your other AI agents and everyday apps like email, Drive, GitHub, Notion, meeting recorders, and more than 20 others. It also saves new memories so GPT stays in sync with the same context. This memory is more precise and accurate than connecting tools directly to Claude via MCP. It is a real memory that follows you, private and portable.

Philip Kubinski

### Unabyss 1.1

Hey everyone

Since the launch, we went heads-down and shipped a batch of improvements. Quick rundown:

Imports improved - both in terms of reliability and efficiency. The big one. If you tried Unabyss early and a source synced halfway or dropped data, that's fixed. Every import runs clean. And we re able to build even more detailed context for you.

Better cross-agent memory. We upgraded the store tool in our MCP - so if you run more than one agent, they finally share context. What you tell Claude, ChatGPT picks up too. No more re-explaining yourself to every assistant. [...] Unabyss

Hey PH 👋 Philip here, co-founder of Unabyss.

What is Unabyss? Unabyss is your personal context layer - a single, structured vault of your identity, knowledge, and preferences that any AI app or agent can access instantly, with you in full control of what gets shared and with whom.

The Problem Every AI tool you use starts from zero. You re-explain your role, your goals, your tone, your company - over and over. And when you finally do build up context inside one platform, it's trapped there. ChatGPT memory doesn't follow you to Claude. Claude Projects don't talk to Cursor. The more AI tools you adopt, the worse it gets. [...] ### Unabyss

Hey PH Philip here, co-founder of Unabyss.

What is Unabyss? Unabyss is your personal context layer - a single, structured vault of your identity, knowledge, and preferences that any AI app or agent can access instantly, with you in full control of what gets shared and with whom.

The Problem Every AI tool you use starts from zero. You re-explain your role, your goals, your tone, your company - over and over. And when you finally do build up context inside one platform, it's trapped there. ChatGPT memory doesn't follow you to Claude. Claude Projects don't talk to Cursor. The more AI tools you adopt, the worse it gets.
